description: Pipeline for creating a new Swag Labs Playwright e2e test case.

stages.name: Scope scenario
checks: Confirm the scenario maps to real Swag Labs UI behavior.
Confirm whether the test belongs in web, web-mobile, or user-variants.

stages.name: Design test
checks: Choose existing fixture or define a minimal arrange path.
Identify page-object methods needed for reusable interactions.

stages.name: Implement
checks: Update page object only when duplication or reuse justifies it.
Avoid hardcoded waits and brittle selectors.

stages.name: Verify
checks: Run the smallest relevant Playwright test command.
